content:
Hi,

I am looking into contributing to nova-core and noticed the "Initial Devinit support" task on the TODO list [1].
It seems like this work could be handled by the GSP. Am I missing something?

Thanks!

[1] https://docs.kernel.org/gpu/nova/core/todo.html#initial-devinit-support

Mmm looking at this task I am not quite sure what it is about, to be honest :) Outside of the BIOS (which is done) this looks like stuff that should be normally done by the GSP? @Danilo Krummrich do you have more context?
